name: Good Credit America LLC
description_short: Credit repair company that disputes errors and negative items on credit reports. Good Credit America helps clients challenge inaccuracies via certified mail with a money-back guarantee.
description_long:
Good Credit America, LLC is a credit repair firm founded by Dawud Muhammad, a board-certified credit consultant with over a decade of financial industry experience. The company positions itself as a fast-growing credit repair service dedicated to helping individuals and businesses resolve credit challenges and achieve financial freedom. According to their website, Muhammad started the company after his own credit struggles, motivated to help others avoid similar mistakes and navigate the U.S. credit system more effectively.

The company offers traditional credit repair services centered on disputing negative items and inaccuracies on credit reports. Their service process involves an initial phone consultation, quick enrollment, credit report analysis, and then sending formal challenges via certified mail to credit bureaus. They address a wide range of credit issues including collections, late payments, charge-offs, tax liens, judgments, bankruptcies, foreclosures, medical bills, child support claims, repossessions, and public records. Clients receive a dedicated portal to track progress and access 24/7 customer support.

Good Credit America differentiates itself through a money-back guarantee if clients see no results, a streamlined 5-step process designed to produce results within weeks, and claims of being the "fastest growing credit repair services company." They emphasize professional expertise, personalized service, and rapid turnaround compared to DIY credit repair attempts. Their standard pricing tier is $149/month with a one-time enrollment/audit fee, and they promote 24/7 support availability.

However, prospective clients should note that credit repair companies cannot legally remove accurate negative items—only disputed inaccuracies. The company's guarantees and claims about rapid results should be viewed cautiously, as credit disputes typically take 30-90 days per cycle. The website lacks specifics about regulatory compliance (CROA licensing, bonding), detailed success metrics, or transparent information about what results are realistically achievable. As with any credit repair service, consumers have the legal right to dispute items themselves for free. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

tiers.name: Credit Repair Program
features: Credit report analysis across all three bureaus
Dispute filing for inaccurate and unverifiable items

pros: Money-back guarantee if no results achieved
Handles comprehensive range of negative items (10+ categories from collections to tax liens)
Streamlined 5-step process with fast turnaround claims (results in first few weeks)
24/7 customer support availability via phone and email
Founder is board-certified credit consultant with 10+ years financial industry experience
Dedicated client portal for tracking progress and case management
Low monthly fee ($149) with transparent single pricing tier
Free initial phone consultation to assess fit before enrollment
cons: Website lacks information about CROA compliance, licensing, or bonding requirements
No specific success rate data or client testimonials provided
Claims about results in 'first few weeks' may be misleading—disputes typically take 30-90 days per cycle
No transparency about what qualifies for their money-back guarantee or realistic outcome expectations
Cannot remove accurate negative items, only dispute inaccuracies—limitation not clearly disclosed
best_for: Individuals with disputed or inaccurate negative items on credit reports seeking professional dispute management
People with multiple credit issues (collections, charge-offs, judgments) who want consolidated expert handling
Busy professionals who lack time to dispute items themselves and want hands-off service with progress tracking
diagnosis: Good Credit America is best for consumers with inaccurate or disputed negative items on their credit reports who want professional dispute management and prefer outsourcing the process. The critical caveat: credit repair companies can only remove inaccurate items, not accurate negative information—and credit disputes take 30-90 days per cycle regardless of company claims about rapid results.
services: Dispute filing via certified mail to credit bureaus
Client portal access for case tracking
24/7 customer support via phone and email
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3465 N Desert Dr Suite 4451, East Point, GA 30344
